business.name: Justin's Gutter Cleaning and More LLC
business.tagline: When you call, we show up

hero.headline: The gutter guy *Fredericksburg calls first*
hero.subheadline: 24-hour response time. On time, every time, with the gear that gets it done right.

services.title: Gutter Cleaning & Repair
services.description: Complete gutter cleanouts, downspout clearing, and minor repairs. We cover your furniture and clean up after.

services.title: Pressure Washing
services.description: House exteriors, decks, sidewalks, and driveways. Professional equipment that strips away years of buildup.

services.title: Gutter Guard Installation
services.description: Remove old guards, install new protection systems. Keep leaves out, water flowing.

services.title: Roof & Gutter Maintenance
services.description: Roof cleaning, gutter inspections, and seasonal maintenance to prevent costly damage.

about.heading: Real response time
about.body: We're the Fredericksburg team that answers within 24 hours and shows up when we say we will. One guy, one truck, getting it done right.

reviews.name: Kelley W.
reviews.text: Justin is excellent. Used him twice already — every time I reach out, he responds within 24 hours and completes the work within 24 hours.

reviews.name: Karen S.
reviews.text: Personable and friendly, showed up on time. Cleaned my deck, gutters, and front sidewalk. Took care to cover my furniture first — everything looks brand new!

reviews.name: Carol F.
reviews.text: First class service that's hard to find. His attention to detail is second to none — he truly cares about the outcome and the people he serves.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Fredericksburg and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local service you can count on

cta.heading: Ready to get it done?
cta.body: Free estimates, fast response, and work that lasts. Call or click to get started.
